items.title: Returning to pre-Trumpian politics won’t save America
items.description: The opening of the Obama presidential library set off a wave of nostalgia for an era that is not coming back

items.description: Nasdaq listing caps more than a decade of deals that transformed an Italian start-up into a global internet company

items.title: French push to exclude UK from EU defence spending backfires
items.description: Paris loses out on cheap loans due to strict eligibility criteria it had championed

items.title: Oil market opens up as retail traders pour in
items.description: CME Group to launch 10-barrel contract after Iran war triggers rush of bets on crude prices

items.title: Uber stalls European food delivery push as it pursues Delivery Hero takeover
items.description: Ride-hailing company will no longer launch in five of its seven planned new markets this year

items.title: Wall Street banks recover in China amid trading boom
items.description: China securities units of Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley and JPMorgan posted record profits last year

items.title: China cools on overseas publication of scientific research
items.description: Policymakers discuss reducing incentives for academics to submit papers to international journals over leak concerns

items.title: Donald Trump defies storms and heatwave to deliver July 4 address
items.description: President eulogises forebears and eviscerates enemies at Lincoln Memorial on 250th anniversary of independence

items.title: Iran mourners demand revenge at ayatollah’s funeral
items.description: The week-long remembrance is intended to demonstrate public support for the regime
